title: 'They took £20,000 I didn't owe': Parents hit by child maintenance errors
summary: 30 parents reported billing errors from child maintenance service, with some incorrectly charged thousands of pounds. The errors highlight systemic problems in the government's maintenance collection system.
content: John Hammond is one of 30 parents who told BBC Your Voice they'd experienced problems with the CMS.

zh.title: "他们拿走了我不欠的20,000英镑":家长遭儿童抚养费错误

title: Jim Cramer fears SpaceX's IPO could be 'destructive' for the rest of market
summary: Jim Cramer warns that SpaceX's anticipated IPO could fuel speculation and destabilize the broader market. His concern reflects growing worry about inflated valuations and retail investor enthusiasm.
content: CNBC's Jim Cramer said he is growing concerned about the speculative nature in the IPO market.

zh.title: Jim Cramer担心SpaceX的IPO可能对市场其他部分"具有破坏性"
zh.summary: Jim Cramer警告说,SpaceX即将进行的IPO可能会助长投机并破坏更广泛的市场稳定。他的担忧反映了人们对虚高估值和散户投资者热情的日益增加的担忧。

title: Are you ‘doomjobbing’ while looking for work? Know the signs — and do this instead.
summary: Job seekers may be self-sabotaging their search through 'doomjobbing,' applying to unsuitable positions and giving up prematurely. Changing application strategies can significantly improve outcomes.
content: “It was soul-crushing,” says one job hunter, who only found work once she stopped making this popular application mistake.

title: This hedge fund just dumped the ‘big three’ airline stocks, as the industry faces soaring fuel costs
summary: Hedge fund Appaloosa exited positions in major airlines (Delta, American, United) due to rising fuel costs pressuring margins. The fund simultaneously increased stakes in Amazon and Uber.
content: Appaloosa sold off its entire positions in Delta, American and United, while loading up on shares of Amazon and Uber.

title: Berkshire’s Abel sours on some of Warren Buffett’s picks, while betting big on Delta
summary: Berkshire Hathaway's Greg Abel invested $2.8 billion in Delta Airlines, reversing Warren Buffett's 2020 exit from U.S. airlines. This signals a strategic divergence under the new leadership.
content: Warren Buffett exited U.S. airlines back in 2020, but successor Greg Abel placed a $2.8 billion fresh bet on Delta.

summary: Appaloosa Management nearly doubled its Amazon investment in Q1, making it the fund's largest equity holding as of March 31. The move reflects confidence in Amazon's growth potential amid tech optimism.

summary: The UK aviation watchdog is considering rules that would allow a Heathrow rival airport to lead potential expansion efforts. This signals a potential shift in how airport expansion decisions are made in the UK.

summary: X (formerly Twitter) has committed to faster removal of hate speech and terrorist content in the UK, per requirements from UK media regulator Ofcom. The commitment comes following recent violent crimes targeting Jewish communities.

title: 30-year Treasury yield tops 5.1%, highest in nearly a year

title: UK borrowing costs rise and pound falls as leadership drama continues

The currency and bond market movements reflect investor anxiety about future fiscal policy.

title: British Gas pays £20m over force-fitting of prepayment meters
summary: British Gas is paying £20 million to settle allegations that debt agents forcibly entered homes of vulnerable customers to install prepayment meters. This settlement addresses serious breaches of consumer protection and highlights predatory debt collection practices.

title: Trump leaves China after talks dominated by trade, oil and Taiwan

content: U.S. President Donald Trump traveled to China this week for two days of meetings with Chinese President Xi Jinping, after a year of heightened trade tensions.

title: Claim, counter-claim and tech's seedy side exposed: Five things we learned in the Musk-Altman trial
summary: The Musk v. Altman trial revealed disputed claims between the tech titans and exposed questionable practices within the tech industry during weeks of testimony. The jury is now set to decide the case as deliberations approach.
content: As the jury deliberates, this is what we found out during the weeks-long trial with two tech titans at its heart.

zh.title: 声称、反驳与科技业阴暗面曝光：我们从马斯克-奥特曼审判中学到的五件事
zh.summary: 马斯克诉奥特曼案的审判揭示了两位科技巨头之间的争议性主张，并在数周的庭审中暴露了科技行业内的可疑做法。陪审团现已准备好在审议开始时做出裁决。

title: Hotel owners expected a World Cup boom - so far it hasn't happened
summary: Hotels in World Cup host cities have not seen the expected tourism surge, with industry surveys describing the tournament as a 'non-event' for occupancy. The shortfall challenges assumptions about the economic benefits of hosting major sporting events.
content: An industry body survey found hotels in World Cup host cities see the tournament as a "non-event".

zh.title: 酒店老板期待世界杯热潮——但迄今为止还未出现
zh.summary: 世界杯东道主城市的酒店并未见到预期的旅游热潮，行业调查将该赛事描述为入住率的"非事件"。这一不足对关于举办大型体育赛事的经济效益假设提出了质疑。

title: Honda shares rise over 7% as investors shrug off first operating loss in nearly 70 years
summary: Honda's stock jumped over 7% despite reporting its first annual operating loss in nearly seven decades, suggesting investor optimism about turnaround prospects. The positive market reaction indicates confidence in management's recovery plans.
content: Honda Motor rose over 7% on Friday, even after posting its first annual operating loss in nearly 70 years.

zh.title: 本田股价上涨超过7% 投资者对近70年首次营业亏损不以为意
zh.summary: 尽管本田报告了近70年来首次年度营业亏损，但其股价仍上涨超7%，这表明投资者对扭转前景持乐观态度。积极的市场反应表明市场对管理层的复兴计划充满信心。

title: Nvidia earnings alone won’t rescue the S&P 500 from its new sell signal
summary: The S&P 500 has triggered overbought warnings heading into a major earnings season led by Nvidia and retail giants. Even strong Nvidia results may not reverse the broader market's technical sell signals, analysts warn.
content: Overbought warnings come ahead of a massive tech and retail earnings lineup.

zh.title: 英伟达财报单独无法拯救标普500指数摆脱其新卖出信号
zh.summary: 标普500指数在由英伟达和零售巨头主导的大规模财报季到来之际触发了超买警告。分析师警告，即使英伟达财报强劲，也可能无法扭转更广泛市场的技术性卖出信号。

title: Oil prices jump after Trump says China agreed to buy U.S. crude following Xi talks
summary: Oil prices surged on news that China agreed to purchase American crude oil as part of Trump's negotiations with Xi Jinping. The agreement could significantly increase U.S. oil exports and reshape global energy markets.
content: Oil prices rose Friday on news that China has agreed to purchase oil from America

zh.title: 特朗普称中国同意购买美国原油后油价跳涨
zh.summary: 在中国同意购买美国原油的消息传出后，油价上升，这是特朗普与习近平谈判的结果。该协议可能会大幅增加美国石油出口，并重塑全球能源市场。

title: Dead people claiming Social Security? Here’s one — but we’re still looking for the other 19,999,999.
summary: Investigators found one confirmed case of a deceased person claiming Social Security benefits, but audits suggest potentially millions more fraudulent claims remain undiscovered. The investigation highlights ongoing challenges in verifying beneficiary status within the program.
content: After a year of hunting down Social Security cheats, here’s where we stand.

zh.title: 已故人士领取社会保障金？我们找到了一个——但还在寻找其他1999万9999个
zh.summary: 调查人员发现了一例确认的已故人士领取社会保障福利的案例，但审计表明可能还有数百万起欺诈性领取未被发现。该调查突显了在核实项目内受益人身份时面临的持续挑战。

title: Closing arguments conclude in Musk v. Altman, jury to deliberate next week
summary: Closing arguments wrapped up in the Musk v. Altman case with jury deliberations set to begin Monday, though the verdict will be advisory only. The case centers on disputes between the tech entrepreneurs over OpenAI's direction and governance.
content: The jury's verdict in Musk v. Altman will be advisory, and deliberations are set to begin on Monday.

zh.title: 马斯克诉奥特曼案结案陈词完成，陪审团下周开始评议
zh.summary: 马斯克诉奥特曼案的结案陈词已完成，陪审团将于下周一开始评议，尽管裁决将仅具有顾问性质。该案的核心是两位科技企业家围绕OpenAI方向和治理的纠纷。

title: South Korea's Kospi hit fresh record of 8,000 as Trump-Xi talks enter second day
summary: South Korea's Kospi index reached a record high of 8,000 as investors monitored ongoing high-level negotiations between Trump and Xi Jinping, reflecting market optimism amid diplomatic developments.
content: Asia-Pacific markets traded mixed as investors tracked the second day of high-stakes talks between Donald Trump and Xi Jinping.

zh.title: 韩国综合指数创历史新高达8000，特朗普-习近平谈话进入第二天
zh.summary: 韩国综合指数创历史新高达8000，投资者关注特朗普与习近平之间正在进行的高层谈判，反映了在外交发展中市场的乐观情绪。

title: This summer’s World Cup will be no match for Taylor Swift when it comes to live events
summary: The 2026 FIFA World Cup running June 11-July 19 across North America faces competition from major live events, with tickets ranging from $1,640 to over $10,000 despite significant venue availability.
content: The World Cup runs from June 11 to July 19, with games being played in cities across the U.S., Canada and Mexico. Tickets went on sale in October and have sold for as much as $10,000, with the cheapest options to see the U.S. team running around $1,640.

zh.title: 今年夏天世界杯将无法与泰勒·斯威夫特的现场演出相抗衡
zh.summary: 2026年FIFA世界杯将在北美地区举行，时间为6月11日至7月19日，尽管有大量场地可用，但面临来自重大现场活动的竞争，门票价格从1,640美元到10,000美元以上不等。

title: Figma has a fix for its ailing stock — a new way to make money off its AI products
summary: Figma's stock surged after beating earnings expectations and raising its full-year outlook, driven by new monetization strategies for its AI-powered design products.
content: Figma’s stock soars after earnings beat expectations again, and the full-year outlook was raised.

zh.title: Figma找到了解决股票困境的办法——利用其AI产品获利的新方式
zh.summary: Figma股价在超过盈利预期并提高全年展望后大幅上涨，这是由其AI驱动设计产品的新货币化策略推动的。
